personal.name: Syed Hamza Ali
personal.title: AI/ML Engineer
personal.bio: Harvard Data Science graduate building end-to-end intelligent systems — from PySpark pipelines to production LLM deployments. Specializing in ML, NLP, and MLOps.

bullets: Design and execute complex technical prompts to benchmark reasoning, coding accuracy, and instruction-following across frontier LLMs including Claude, Gemini CLI, Google Jules, and Cursor; evaluate multi-step agent performance across full codebases.

Develop custom tool suites for agent evaluation, assessing agents' ability to identify correct tools, query external APIs and databases, extract relevant data, and integrate results — across single-agent and multi-agent comparative frameworks.

Provide RLHF ground-truth solutions across Python, JavaScript, SQL, and Java; support Google as primary client on LLM training and evaluation projects spanning web development, data pipelines, and algorithmic domains.
Collaborated with development, QA, and DBA teams to maintain lab information systems and deploy production code using Agile/Scrum methodology.
Resolved L2 & L3 ServiceNow tickets by analyzing issues, initiating bug fix processes, and writing SQL queries to generate reports supporting recovery from major incidents.

education.degree: Master of Liberal Arts in Data Science

projects.title: Store Sales Forecasting Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Databricks Lakehouse · XGBoost · MLflow
projects.description: Architected a Medallion Architecture (Bronze/Silver/Gold) ETL pipeline processing 3M+ retail sales records with Databricks Delta Live Tables and PySpark. Engineered 20+ time-series features including multi-period lag features (1–90 days) and calendar signals. Implemented automated daily retraining via Databricks Jobs (DAG of 4 tasks) with MLflow for experiment tracking and champion/challenger model promotion.

projects.title: Conversational AI Customer Service Agent
projects.subtitle: BERT · FastAPI · Docker · Dialogflow
projects.description: Fine-tuned a BERT model (BertForSequenceClassification) on ~30K customer service utterances across 22 intent categories, achieving 99.83% accuracy — vs. 54.35% with a rule-based baseline. Built a Dockerized FastAPI serving layer with async request handling, exposing RESTful webhook endpoints for real-time Google Dialogflow integration. Published trained model to Hugging Face Hub.

projects.title: ETF-Era Bitcoin Exposure & Risk Forecasting
projects.subtitle: Harvard Capstone · Logit-Lasso · HAR-OLS · Published
projects.description: Harvard capstone research project co-authored with 4 contributors. Engineered a 2,212-observation financial panel across 136 features. Implemented expanding-window walk-forward validation evaluating 1,437+ out-of-sample forecasts using Diebold-Mariano and Clark-West tests. The dual-forecast strategy compressed maximum drawdown from -67% to -21% vs. buy-and-hold.

projects.title: ProShare
projects.subtitle: MERN Stack · Socket.io · Full-Stack
projects.description: Full-stack developer social platform built on the MERN stack, owning the entire lifecycle from MongoDB schema design and Express REST API to React UI and deployment. Engineered a real-time 1-on-1 chat system with Socket.io featuring typing indicators, read receipts, and unread counts. Implemented a read-through cache pattern with background sync for message consistency against cold-start timeouts.
